childElements.name: Risk_Review_Malpractice_Claims_History_Question_1
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Any malpractice settlements and/or judgements with payment greater than or equal to $300,000", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Malpractice_Claims_History_Question_2
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Three or more malpractice settlements and/or judgements", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Malpractice_Claims_History_Question_3
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "ALL pending/open claims", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Malpractice_Claims_History_Question_4
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Three or more dismissed claims in the last five years (dismissed = $0 payment)", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Previous denial of liability coverage", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Other_Question_1
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Garnishments/Liens/Child support issues (route to Legal & Payroll)", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Other_Question_2
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Any adverse actions against Licensure/Privileges/Board Certification", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Other_Question_3
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Conflict of Interest form contains an answer in the affirmative (route to Compliance)", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Other_Question_4
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Any suspensions or exclusions from Insurance Plans/Third Party Payors (route to Compliance)", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Other_Question_5
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Existing SCP Clinician (if Clinician’s history is within the risk review parameters regardless of previous\r\nreview and approval)", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Personal_History_Question_1
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Civil/Administrative investigation, action, or complaint", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Personal_History_Question_2
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Criminal proceeding or conviction (excluding misdemeanors related to minor traffic violations).\r\nDUI/DWI(s) are not considered a minor traffic violation; therefore, require a risk review", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Personal_History_Question_3
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Recovery history (substance abuse, psychological, anger management) - The following
documents must be dated within six (6) months of the date the checklist is submitted. If the recovery
history is older than 20 years, except for mental health/addiction recovery, then the review will not be
required.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Personal History
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Personal History", "collapse" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Recovery_History_Question_1
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Completed and current SCP Applicant Profile and Release (aka Request & Release)", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Recovery_History_Question_2
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Current NPDB Report", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Recovery_History_Question_3
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Clinician attestation describing impairment, treatment, recovery, current status and fitness for clinical work", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Risk_Review_Recovery_History_Question_4
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Written clearance from proper monitoring entity status return to work status and restrictions, if any", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Recovery History

omniProcessElements.name: RiskReviewChecklist
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Risk Review Checklist", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : "Risk Review Checklist", "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
